title: AI assistant
description: Enable local WebLLM with Juni-grounded defaults.

steps.caption: Open the AI panel
steps.narration: Click AI in the toolbar. The assistant is off by default and never downloads weights until you opt in. You need WebGPU — Chrome or Edge works best.

steps.caption: Pick the default model
steps.narration: Leave Coder 1.5B selected — it is the recommended default for Juni grounding. Use Coder 3B for stronger code help, or Instruct 1.5B for lighter chat. Old 0.5B ids upgrade automatically.

steps.caption: Enable and ask
steps.narration: Click Enable and download, wait for Ready, then ask about world_draw3d, colliders, or entity scripts. Docs RAG injects matching Juni API chunks so answers stay on the real host APIs.

steps.caption: Insert and explain
steps.narration: Use Insert into editor or Replace selection on fenced Juni replies. After a failed compile, Explain with AI summarizes diagnostics. Prefer juni check as the source of truth.
